stratlite:
  lookback 100
  var position 0
  var entry_price 0
  let open(0) high(0) low(0) close(0) volume(0) = 0
  let x = 100
  if (ema(100) > sma(100)) then position 1
  if (ema(100) < sma(100)) then position 0
  if (ema(100) == sma(100)) then position 0
  repeat 100 { ...
  signal position 1
}

lookback 20
var name = 0
var entry_price = 0
var signal = false

<body statements>
  let x = sma(30)  
  let x = sma(20)  
  if x > x then signal long else signal short

  repeat 1 { ... }   // 1 bar to check for crossover

  if signal long then signal long else signal short

  if signal long then signal long else signal short

  let x = sma(20)  
  if x > x then signal long else signal short

  let x = sma(30)  
  if x > x then signal long else signal short

  if signal long then signal long else signal short

</body statements>

lookback 100
var position 1
var entry_price 100
var signal 0

if open >= (sma(100) > ema(50)) then
    let x = -position; signal x; position 0
else if open <= (sma(100) < ema(50)) then
    let x = -position; signal x; position 0
else
    repeat 1 { let x = -position; signal x; position 0 }

lookback 4096
var name = 1
var position = 0
var entry_price = 0

let x = open(0) - high(0)
if x > 0 then
    signal long
else if x < 0 then
    signal short
else
    signal flat

repeat 1 {
    let x = open(0) - high(0)
    if x > 0 and (ema(30) - ema(100)) > 0 then
        signal long
    else if x < 0 and (ema(100) - ema(30)) > 0 then
        signal short
    else
        signal flat
}

stratlite
lookback 1000
var name = "rsi_extreme"
body statements
  let rsi = rsi(1000)
  if rsi > 70 then signal "long"
  else if rsi < 30 then signal "short"
  repeat 1000 { ... }  -- run every bar after warmup
end

lookback 4096
var name = "RSIExtremes"
<body statements>
  let x = exd(ema(4096))
  if x == 50 then signal long
  else if x == 50 then signal short
  else { no signal }
</body statements>

stratlite:
  lookback 4096
  var name position 1
  var name entry_price 0
  var name target 0
  let position = position() -> 0
  let entry_price = entry_price() -> ticks
  let target = target() -> 0
  if rsi(40) > 3000 then signal position 1 else if rsi(40) < 3000 then signal position -1 else if rsi(40) > 2000 then signal position 1
  repeat 1 { ... }  // only one iteration, costs 1 fuel unit
  if rsi(40) > 3000 then signal position 1 else if rsi(40) < 3000 then signal position -1 else if rsi(40) > 2000 then signal position 1

stratlite:
  lookback 4096
  var position 0
  var entry_price 0
  if rsi > 90 then signal position -1
  repeat 1 { let x = % (open); if x == entry_price then position 1 }
  if rsi < 0.0 then signal position -1

  lookback 4096
  var name = 0
  if rsi(4096) < 1.5 then
    signal long 0
  else if rsi(4096) > 1.5 then
    signal short 0
  repeat 1
    let x = 0
    if x == 0 then signal long 0
  end
end

lookback 4096
var position 1
var entry_price 100
var signal TARGET position

if rsi < 30 and entry_price > 0 then
  position = -1
else if rsi < 30 and entry_price < 0 then
  position = 1
else
  position = 0

repeat 1 { 
  if rsi > 30 and entry_price < 0 then
    position = 1
}

let x = 100
x = EXPR;
signal long

stratlite_program(
  N = 4096,
  name = "Breakout Strategy",
  body_statements = [
    "let x = highest() -> ticks;",
    "let y = lowest() -> ticks;",
    "if x > y { let target_position = 1; } else if x < y { let target_position = -1; } else { let target_position = 0; }",
    "repeat 1 { if x > y { signal target_position; } }"
  ]
)

lookback 1000
var name = highest
var name = lowest
repeat 1 { 
    let x = EXPR
    signal long
}

stratlite:
  lookback 4096
  var position -1
  var entry_price 0
  var target -1
  var target_fill -1

  <body statements>
    let x = highest() + lowest()
    if x > 0 then
      let entry_price = x / 2
      if position == -1 then
        position = 1
        target_fill = 1
      else
        position = 0
        target_fill = 0
    else
      position = 0
      target_fill = 0
  repeat 1 { ... }

lookback 4096
var name = highest
<body statements>
  let x = highest(4096)
  if x > 1000 then
    signal 1
  else if x < 1000 then
    signal -1
  else
    signal 0
</body statements>

lookback 4096
var name = highest()
body statements:
  let x = highest() => 500
  if x > 400 then signal long
  else if x < 600 then signal short
repeat 1 { signal long }

stratlite:
  lookback 4096
  var position -1
  var entry_price 0
  highest() var highest_value
  lowest() var lowest_value

  let x = highest_value
  if x > 0 then signal 1 else if x < 0 then signal -1 else signal 0

  repeat 1 { 
    let x = entry_price
    let y = highest_value
    if y > x then signal 1 else if y < x then signal -1 else signal 0
  }

lookback 4096
var position() = 0
var entry_price() = 0

if position() == 1 then
    let x = 10
    let x = EXPR
    if x == 10 then
        signal long
else if position() == -1 then
    let x = -10
    let x = EXPR
    if x == -10 then
        signal short
else
    repeat 1 { 
        let x = 5
        let x = EXPR
        if x == 5 then
            signal long
    }

stratlite:
  lookback 4096
  var name = 0
  let x = position()
  if x == 1 then signal short
  if x == -1 then signal long
  repeat 1 { let x = position() }

```

stratlite
lookback 4096
var name = "ema"
<body statements>
  let x = ema(10)
  if position() > 0 { signal long; } else { signal short; }
</body statements>

stratlite
lookback 4096
var position() = 0
var entry_price() = 0
if position() != 0 then
  let x = ema(9)
  if x > 0 then
    signal long
    position() = 1
else if position() == 0 then
  let x = ema(5)
  if x > 0 then
    signal short
    position() = 0
repeat 1 { entry_price() }
emit stratlite program

stratlite: one program = one trading strategy, run once per closed candle.

lookback 4096
var name = "ema_strategy"
<body statements>
  let x = 100;  signal long
  if position() > 0 { ... } else { ... }
</body statements>

lookback 4096
var name position
var name entry_price

if position == -1
  let x = 1
  if x == 1
    signal long
else
  let x = 0
  if x == 0
    signal short
else
  let x = 1
  repeat 1 { signal long }

var name position
var name entry_price

strategylite
lookback 4096
var state = 0
signal long
repeat 0 { ... }
// no statements
strategylite

lookback 4096
var name = "range_narrow"
var position = 0
var entry_price = 0

if (sma(2) <= 90) {
    signal range_narrow
    position = 1
    entry_price = 0
}

repeat 1 { ... }  // runs once per bar after warmup

// This strategy will set a flat position when the recent range is narrow

lookback 0
var name = "range_narrow"
var position = 0
var entry_price = 0

if (sma(1) < 3000) then
    if (high() < lowest(1)) then
        let x = entry_price
        if (x == 0) then
            position = 1
        else
            position = 0
    else
        position = 0
end if
else
    position = 0
end if

repeat 0 { 
    let x = entry_price
    signal long
}

lookback 4096
var name = flat
var entry_price = 0
var position = 0

if (highest(4096) < low(4096)) then
    signal long
else if (lowest(4096) > high(4096)) then
    signal short
else
    signal flat
repeat 1 { let x = 0; x = 0; signal flat }

lookback 4096
var name flat
<body statements>
  let x = 0; signal long
  if (high() == open() && low() == open()) { x = 1; signal long | fill } else if (high() == close() && low() == close()) { x = 0; signal short | no fill } else { x = 0; signal short | no fill }
repeat 1 { x = x; signal long | fill }
</body statements>

lookback 0
var name flat
if (high(k) == low(k)) then
    signal long
else if (high(k) > low(k)) then
    signal short
else
    signal flat
repeat 1 { }

lookback 1000
var name flat
var entry_price ticks
var position -1

// flat strategy
if (high() < low()) then
    let x = 0
    signal flat
    position 0
end

repeat 1 { signal flat }

lookback 4096
var name flat
if (low(k) < (high(k) - high(k) + 0.5)) then 
    signal long
else 
    signal short
repeat 1 { let x = 0; signal long; }

lookback 4096
var position 0
var entry_price 0

// Signal flat when the recent range is narrow
if (highest(4096) < low(4096)) then
    position 1
end if

repeat 1 { ... }

stratlite
lookback 100
var name = "rsi_trend"
var name = "ema_trend"
var name = "sma_trend"
var name = "signal"
body statements
  let x = sma(10)  -- 10-period SMA
  let y = rsi(10)  -- 10-period RSI
  if y >= 20 { signal = "long" } else if y < 20 { signal = "short" } else { signal = "flat" }
repeat 1 { x = sma(10) y = rsi(10) }
end

stratlite
  lookback 1000
  var name = "rsi_sma"
  <body statements>
    let x = sma(3) in 0..4096; signal long|short|flat
    if rsi(3) > 30 { signal long } else if rsi(3) < 30 { signal short } else { signal flat }
  repeat 1000 { ... }  
</body>

lookback 4096
var name = "rsi_trend"
var position = 0
var entry_price = 0

if (rsi(4096) > 30) then
  if (ema(4096) > 1000) then
    let x = 1
    signal long
    position = 1
    entry_price = open
else if (rsi(4096) < 30) then
  let x = -1
  signal short
  position = -1
else
  repeat (4096) {
    let x = 0
    signal flat
    position = 0
  }
end

stratlite: one program = one trading strategy, run once per closed candle.
lookback 4096
var name = rsi
var name = sma
body statements:
  let x = rsi
  if x > 3000 { signal long }
  if x < 3000 { signal short }
repeat 4096 { ... }  -- count evaluated once; every iteration costs fuel
market data open k high k low k close k volume k
indicators sma 4096 ema 4096 rsi 4096
state probes position() entry_price()
signal sets the TARGET position, filled at the NEXT bar's open; no signal means the position carries. Prices are integer ticks. There is no print, no string, no array, no function, no while, no f64, and no way to see the future: offsets beyond lookback or below 0 are runtime errors.

lookback 1000
var name = "strategy"
var position = 0
var entry_price = 0

if rsi() > 30
    signal long
else if rsi() < 50
    signal short
else
    repeat 1
        let x = 0; x = 0; signal long;

        if x == 1
            position = 1;
            entry_price = 1;
        else
            position = 0;
            entry_price = 0;
end

stratlite
lookback 4096
var name = "rsi_trend"
body statements
  let x = sma(30) if x > 3000 then signal 1 else signal 0
  if rsi(30) > 3000 then signal 1 else if rsi(30) < 3000 then signal 0
repeat 1 { ... }
end
end

lookback 4096
var name = "rsg"

// RSI filter: RSI above 30
let rsi = rsi(3000)
if rsi > 0 then
    signal long
else
    signal short

repeat 1 { // evaluate once
    if rsi > 0 then
        signal long
    else
        signal short
}

lookback 4096
var name = "rsi_filter"
var name = "ema_trend"

if rsi(3000) > 3000 then
    let x = ema(5) * 2 * 1.5
    let x = signal long | flat
    repeat 1 { ... }
end

if rsi(3000) < 3000 then
    let x = ema(5) * 1.5
    let x = signal short
end

lookback 4096
var position -1
var entry_price ticks

if rsi(ema(4096)) >= 3000 then signal position 1
else if rsi(ema(4096)) <= 1500 then signal position -1
else repeat 1 { if position == 0 then signal position 1 else signal position -1 }

stratlite
lookback 4096
var name = "rsi_trend"
body statements
  let x = sma(30)
  if x >= 3000 then signal long
  if x <= 3000 then signal short
repeat 1 { if x >= 3000 then signal long else if x <= 3000 then signal short else ... }
end
end

lookback 4096
var name = "rsi_trend"
var position = 0

body statements:
  let x = if rsi(50) > 30 then 1 else 0
  let x = if rsi(50) < 30 then -1 else 0

  repeat 1 {
    if rsi(50) > 30 and sma(5) > 5000 then position = 1
  }

  if x == 1 then emit position 1
  if x == -1 then emit position 0

stratlite: 0 0
var name = "rsi_trend"  // persistent state
lookback N = 4096  // max window/offset
var position = 0
var entry_price = 0

<body statements>
  let x = sma(30)  // rsi in hundredths
  if x > 3000 then signal position = 1 else signal position = 0
  if x < 3000 then signal position = -1 else signal position = 0
  repeat 0 { ... }  // no signal
</body statements>

lookback 4096
var name = 0
signal long
repeat 1 { let x = 1000; signal long; }

lookback 4096
var name = 0
body statements:
  let x = 0
  if x == 0 then signal long
  else if x == -1 then signal short
  else if x == 1 then signal flat
repeat 0 { ... }

lookback 2000
var name position 1
var name entry_price 0

repeat 1 { 
  if entry_price == 0 then 
    signal long
  else if entry_price == 1 then 
    signal short
  else 
    signal flat
}

lookback 4096
var name = 0
var position = 0
var entry_price = 0

if position == 0 and entry_price != 0 then
    let x = 0
    signal long
    position = 1
    entry_price = 0
end

repeat 1 { 
    let x = 0
    signal short
    position = 0
    entry_price = 0
end

lookback 0
var position 0
var entry_price 0

if entry_price() == 0 then
    position = 1
    entry_price = ticks
else
    position = 0
end if

repeat 0 { ... }

lookback 4096
var name = 0
signal long
repeat 0 { signal long | if (entry_price() == 0) { signal long | signal short } }
